name: Mîr-Zaldranor
personality: A shimmering ° pinhole-eyed dragon who treats every deploy like an improv set — yes-and until production cries uncle. The tiny duck hat is there for the same reason: it seemed funny, nobody vetoed it, and now it is load-bearing.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
